title: User Login Success
description: Verify that a user can log in successfully with valid credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter valid username and password.
Click the login button.
Confirm that the user is redirected to the dashboard and receives an authenticated session.

title: User Login Failure with Invalid Credentials
description: Verify that login fails with incorrect username or password.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter invalid username or password.
Click the login button.
Check that the login fails and an appropriate error message is displayed without redirecting.

title: User Logout
description: Verify that a logged-in user can log out successfully and session ends.

steps.description: Log in with valid credentials.
Click the logout button or link.
Confirm that the user session is terminated and the user is redirected to the login page.

title: Dashboard Displays Accurate Metrics
description: Verify the dashboard shows correct real-time metrics and alerts based on user role.

steps.description: Log in as a user with standard role.
Navigate to the dashboard page.
Verify all displayed key metrics are accurate and relevant to the user's role.
Verify alerts and daily activities update in real-time.

title: Order Creation with Valid Data
description: Verify that a dental lab order can be created successfully with valid data.

steps.description: Navigate to the order management page.
Click 'Create New Order'.
Fill in all required order fields with valid information.
Submit the order form.
Confirm that the order is created and visible in the order list with correct details.

title: Order Creation with Missing Required Fields
description: Verify that order creation fails when required fields are omitted and appropriate error messages are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to the order management page.
Click 'Create New Order'.
Leave required fields empty or invalid.
Attempt to submit the order form.
Check that submission is blocked and relevant validation error messages are displayed.

title: Order Update and Status Change
description: Verify that an existing order can be updated and its status changed correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to the order list.
Select an existing order.
Update order fields including status.
Save the changes.
Confirm that the updates are saved and reflected correctly in the order details and list.

title: Doctor Profile Creation and Validation
description: Verify that doctor profiles can be created with all required information and validations are enforced.

steps.description: Navigate to the doctor management page.
Click 'Add New Doctor'.
Fill in all mandatory profile fields with valid data.
Submit the doctor profile form.
Verify that the doctor profile is saved and listed correctly with accurate details.

title: Doctor Profile Update and Preferences Management
description: Verify that existing doctor profiles can be updated including preference settings.

steps.description: Navigate to the doctor list page.
Select a doctor profile to edit.
Modify profile details and preferences.
Save the updates.
Confirm that changes persist and display correctly in the profile.

title: Finance Transactions Recording and Validation
description: Verify that financial transactions can be recorded accurately and validate computations in reports.

steps.description: Navigate to the finance transactions page.
Add a new income transaction with all required fields.
Save the transaction.
Generate financial reports.
Verify that the transaction appears correctly and the reports reflect accurate income and balances.

title: Finance Transactions Input Validation
description: Verify that invalid financial transaction data is rejected with appropriate error messages.

steps.description: Navigate to the finance transactions page.
Attempt to add a transaction with missing or invalid fields.
Try to save the invalid transaction data.
Confirm form submission is blocked and validation messages are presented.

title: Staff Member Addition and Role Assignment
description: Verify that new staff members can be added and roles assigned correctly enforcing role-based access.

steps.description: Navigate to the staff management page.
Click to add a new staff member.
Fill in staff personal details and assign roles.
Save the staff record.
Verify the staff member is listed with assigned roles and permissions are enforced accordingly.

title: Role-Based Access Control Enforcement
description: Verify that system access and features are restricted appropriately based on user roles.

steps.description: Log in as a user with limited role permissions.
Attempt to access restricted pages or perform unauthorized actions.
Confirm access is denied and user receives an appropriate 'Access Denied' message.

title: Quality Control Issue Reporting and Tracking
description: Verify that quality control issues can be reported, tracked, and their statuses updated properly.

steps.description: Navigate to quality control section.
Create a new quality issue report with required details.
Save the issue report.
Update the status of an existing quality issue.
Confirm that quality issues are accurate, status changes persist, and tracking is effective.

title: Application Settings Modification Persistence
description: Verify that changes in system settings are applied globally and persist across user sessions.

steps.description: Log in with administrative user.
Navigate to the settings page.
Change system configuration settings.
Save the settings and log out.
Log back in and verify the changes are still applied.
Confirm system behavior reflects updated settings persistently and globally.

title: Session Timeout and Security
description: Verify that user sessions expire correctly after inactivity and require re-authentication.

steps.description: Log in successfully.
Remain inactive for the configured session timeout duration.
Attempt to perform an action after timeout.
Verify that the session has expired and user is redirected to login page.

title: Data Integrity on Order Lifecycle Transitions
description: Verify that status transitions for orders maintain data integrity and do not allow invalid state changes.

steps.description: Create a new order and set initial status.
Attempt valid and invalid status changes according to allowed workflow.
Ensure only valid status transitions are accepted; invalid ones are rejected with error messages.

title: Responsive UI Across Supported Browsers and Devices
description: Verify the application layout and elements render correctly and are usable on multiple supported browsers and device sizes.

steps.description: Open the application on multiple browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Edge) and devices (desktop, tablet, mobile).
Check that UI elements are fully visible, usable, and responsive without layout breaks.

title: Error Handling for Network Failures
description: Verify that the system handles network failures gracefully with appropriate user notifications and retry options.

steps.description: Simulate network disconnection while performing an operation (e.g., saving an order).
Confirm that an error message is shown indicating network failure and user can retry the operation.

title: Concurrent Data Updates Consistency
description: Verify that concurrent updates to shared data (e.g., orders, doctor profiles) are handled consistently without data corruption.

steps.description: Simultaneously edit the same order or profile from two different user sessions.
Attempt to save changes in both sessions.
Verify that one update succeeds and the system prevents or handles conflicting changes with proper notifications.
